name: Velvet Burn
ingredients: Bourbon, sugar cube, bitters, orange peel
description: Feeling a bit bold today? A clean, spirit-forward classic that lets the bourbon shine. Simple, confident, and bold with a smooth warmth that feels timeless and grounded.

name: After Hours
ingredients: Rye whiskey, Averna amaro, bitters, cherry
description: A lighter take on a bold favorite-still rich and moody, but softened with herbal sweetness that makes it feel smooth, easy, and quietly powerful.

name: After Hours
ingredients: Rye whiskey, Averna amaro, bitters, cherry
description: Seeking warmth and coziness today? This deep, intense, and comforting drink leans into its richness with bold herbal notes and a strong finish that wraps around you like a slow evening.

name: Bright Ember
description: Feeling cozy? Bright citrus meets mellow bourbon in a balanced, easygoing drink that feels both refreshing and comforting, just like a calm moment with a little spark.

name: Sunset Pour
description: Soft, soothing, and gently sweet. This light and calming drink feels like a quiet sunset, easing you into a relaxed and cozy state.

name: Sunset Pour
description: Feeling joyful today? A richer, more vibrant twist—warming whiskey shines through with bold citrus and honey, creating a lively yet comforting drink full of energy and glow for your bright mood.

name: Tequila Sunrise
description: This will be perfect for your joyful mood today! Bright and uplifting with a smooth tequila base, this drink balances citrus sweetness with a playful vibe that feels like pure sunshine in a glass.

name: Aurora Spritz
ingredients: Prosecco, elderflower liqueur, soda water, mint, lime
description: Want something light and cheerful? This light, sparkling, and full of charm drink brings soft floral notes and bubbly happiness that makes everything feel a little more fun.

name: Aurora Spritz
ingredients: Bourbon, honey syrup, lemon juice, egg white
description: Crisp, airy, and super refreshing, this easy spritz feels cool and lively with fresh mint and bubbles that instantly wake up the mood.

name: Basil No.3
ingredients: Gin, lime juice, basil, simple syrup
description: Clean, herb-forward, and bright, this drink highlights basil and lime in a crisp, balanced way that feels sharp, and energizing.

name: Tender Bloom
description: A drink that's brighter and more striking, this stronger version keeps its smooth pear character while delivering a sharper, fresher edge with a confident finish.

name: Tender Bloom
description: Soft and delicate with a gentle fruitiness, this lighter sip feels elegant, airy, and calm—perfect for a romantic, dreamy kind of mood.

name: Purple Rain
ingredients: Vodka, blue curaçao, cranberry juice, lemon juice
description: We all feel dreamy on certain days! Sweet, smooth, and a little mysterious, this drink feels romantic and playful with a dreamy color and a soft, floaty charm that lingers like a daydream.

name: Where It Ends
ingredients: Gin, lemon juice, simple syrup, crème de mûre
description: We all feel dreamy on certain days! Rich berry notes and a bold gin base give this drink a deeper, more intense feel, with a velvety finish that lingers just a little longer.

name: Where It Ends
ingredients: Gin, lemon juice, simple syrup, crème de mûre
description: If you’re feeling extra bold today, this version leans into the gin and dark berry depth. Strong, sharp, and confidently layered for a bolder sip with real presence.
